mentions.raw_name: Severed heads of Prendahl and Sallor
Daenerys Targaryen (Dany, Daenerys Stormborn, Khaleesi, the Unburnt, Mother of Dragons)
Rhaegar Targaryen (Prince Rhaegar, Prince of Dragonstone)
Brave Companions (mentioned by Jorah for comparison)
The Three Thousand (who made their stand at Qohor)
Ghiscari (Prendahl's blood; Grazdan's heritage; "blood of ancient Ghis"; old pure Ghiscari tongue)
Dothraki (Dany's khalasar; scouts; Daario's arakh is Dothraki)
Braavosi (Mero's origin; Titan of Braavos referenced)
Valyrian (language spoken in Yunkai, different dialect than Astapor)
Free Cities (none will hire Mero anymore)
Daario's arakh (Dothraki curved sword; golden naked woman hilt)
Daario's Myrish stiletto (golden naked woman hilt; matched pair with arakh)
Cedar chest bound in bronze and gold (containing 50,000 golden marks)
Yunkai gold coins (stepped pyramid / harpy of Ghis)
Rhaegar's high harp with silver strings
Yunkai harpy banner (whip and iron collar in talons)
Stormcrows banner (four crows between crossed thunderbolts)
"A Cask of Ale" (bawdy song Robert liked)

mentions.raw_name: Dragon fire (Dany commands "Dracarys"; Drogon spits red-black flame; Viserion breathes fire)
Mirri Maz Duur's prophecy (Dany will never bear a living child)
Dany's dream in the House of the Undying (referenced but not described)
Dragons growing rapidly (Drogon's tail is longer; "they grow quickly now")
Fall of Astapor (recent; referenced as precedent)
Battle of Yunkai (occurs in this chapter)
Battle of Qohor / Stand of the Three Thousand (historical; Dany references Second Sons fleeing)
Tourney at Storm's End (historical; Rhaegar's early victories)
Tourney at Harrenhal (historical; Rhaegar crowned Lyanna; called "the greatest tourney of them all")
The destruction at Summerhall (implied; "born in grief"; shadow that "haunted him")
Kos (bloodrider rank given to Jhogo, Aggo, Rakharo)
Queen of love and beauty (tourney title Rhaegar gave Lyanna)
